description:
Turn broken spaces into something worth living in.
Step into the role of a renovation specialist and take on jobs that transform messy, damaged, and abandoned spaces into clean, functional, and beautiful homes. From simple cleaning tasks to full-scale renovations, every project challenges your attention to detail, planning, and creativity.

Start with basic jobs like removing trash, cleaning surfaces, and organizing spaces. As you progress, take on more complex tasks such as painting walls, placing furniture, and redesigning interiors. Every action brings visible results, turning neglected environments into comfortable and inviting places.

Earn money, gain experience, and build your reputation as you complete orders for clients across the city. With better results come bigger opportunities — allowing you to upgrade tools, unlock new features, and take on larger, more demanding projects.

Eventually, you can buy old houses, fully renovate them, and sell them for profit. Choose how to restore each property, improve its value, and grow your own renovation business step by step.

Key Features:
	•	Renovation Gameplay: Clean, repair, paint, and restore different properties
	•	Interactive Environment: Move objects, organize spaces, and work with detailed interiors
	•	Tool Variety: Use brushes, cleaning tools, and renovation equipment
	•	Progression System: Earn money, gain experience, and improve your skills
	•	Property Flipping: Buy, renovate, and sell houses for profit
	•	Diverse Locations: Work in apartments, houses, offices, and more

From small cleanups to complete transformations, every project brings visible progress and satisfaction.
House Fixer Simulator delivers a relaxing yet engaging experience where creativity, organization, and smart decisions turn every space into something better.
